TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Anthony_Bonner, title = Anthony_Bonner, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Anthony_Bonner} }

S.FORM: Anthony Bonner sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1968, ryax sa tay 8 nqu tay 6, Anthony Bonner, squliq na p'unro. qyanux na hopa pqwasan biru Anthony Bonner sraral maki Saint Louis University mzyu mari. 2002 kawas,tzyun payat kawas nya qnyat balay mzyu mari nha Utah Jazz. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Anthony Bonner sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1968, ryax sa tay 8 nqu tay 6, Anthony Bonner, squliq na p'unro. qyanux na hopa pqwasan biru Anthony Bonner sraral maki Saint Louis University mzyu mari. 2002 kawas,tzyun payat kawas nya qnyat balay mzyu mari nha Utah Jazz. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: antħonj βonner s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, antħonj βonner, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qjanux na ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru antħonj βonner s~ɕraral maki s~ɕaint louis~ɕ uni*ers~ɕitj mzju mari. **** kawas~ɕ,tzjun pajat kawas~ɕ nja qnjat βalaj mzju mari nħa utaħ *azz. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
